hooks.command: sh -c 'BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "none"); terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code ($BRANCH)" -message "Waiting" -sound Frog -execute "/usr/local/bin/iterm2_focus $ITERM_SESSION_ID"'

sh -c 'BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo "none"); terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code ($BRANCH)" -message "Done" -sound Frog -execute "/usr/local/bin/iterm2_focus $ITERM_SESSION_ID"'

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); used_tok=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.current_usage.input_tokens // empty'); total=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size // empty'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // empty'); out=""; [ -n "$model" ] && out="$model"; [ -n "$used" ] && out="$out | ctx: $(printf '%.0f' "$used")% used"; [ -n "$remaining" ] && out="$out ($(printf '%.0f' "$remaining")% left)"; [ -n "$used_tok" ] && [ -n "$total" ] && out="$out | tokens: $used_tok / $total"; echo "$out"
